query: SELECT id, primaryDomain FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain LIKE '%.com' AND primaryDomain NOT LIKE '%.%.%' AND LENGTH(primaryDomain) > 30 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
